---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for AgenticPMO
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Describe the Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Describe any new agent roles, LangGraph state updates, or PMBOK 8 skill matching integrations.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup screenshots, or diagrams about the feature request here.
